tasks.spec: Responsiveness smoke test. Compute 2 + 2. Write ONLY the file ./answer.txt in your current directory, containing exactly the single integer result and nothing else — no words, no punctuation, no explanation.
tasks.check: grep -qw 4 answer.txt && echo 'correct: swarm returned 4' || { echo 'FAIL: answer.txt must contain 4'; cat answer.txt 2>/dev/null; exit 1; }
